class.name: AutoworkInputSender
class.description: Core class for the Autowork framework: AutoworkInputSender. Enables native testing, assertions, and mock implementations within Blazium Engine.

method.name: action_down
method.description: Simulates global or targeted input events for 'action_down'.

method.name: action_up
method.description: Simulates global or targeted input events for 'action_up'.

method.name: key_down
method.description: Simulates global or targeted input events for 'key_down'. [codeblock] sender.key_down(KEY_SPACE) [/codeblock]

method.name: key_up
method.description: Simulates global or targeted input events for 'key_up'. [codeblock] sender.key_up(KEY_SPACE) [/codeblock]

method.name: mouse_down
method.description: Simulates global or targeted input events for 'mouse_down'. [codeblock] sender.mouse_down(MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT, Vector2(100, 100)) [/codeblock]

method.name: mouse_motion
method.description: Simulates global or targeted input events for 'mouse_motion'.

method.name: mouse_up
method.description: Simulates global or targeted input events for 'mouse_up'. [codeblock] sender.mouse_up(MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT, Vector2(100, 100)) [/codeblock]
